text_block_list.text:
I'm gathering some data with Biwa Hayahide in
preparation for our next race when a muscle in my
arm twinges painfully.
Crick.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Trainer?!

Biwa Hayahide looks worried as she watches me
hold my injured arm.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
How much pain are you in? Where does it hurt? Is
there any swelling?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No, you're not! What if it's something serious? We
need to get that looked at right away!
She drags me to the infirmary...

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text: It's tendinitis.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
You're going to have to give your arm and hand
some rest. If it worsens, you might even require
surgery.
choice_data_list: I feel so bad about this...

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Icing the area won't be enough. You'll have to
stop using your arm for a bit. The good news is
there's no swelling, so it's not too serious.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, bit of a worrywart? I get the feeling you
already knew the injury wasn't that bad from the
start.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
But the fact that you insisted on coming here
proves just how much you care about your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I-I, uh...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If you're feeling better in two or three days, let's
go to a hot spring.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Because the least I can do is take care of you,
and you need plenty of rest. You'd better not
worry about my training for at least a week.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You should apply for some time off and take a
break. If something needs to be handled right
away, we can ask Tazuna to help.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I want you to contact me right away if your
symptoms worsen or if you develop a fever. And
on the day we go to the hot spring—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me? Do you really think you're in any
position to object?
That look in her eyes... She's not messing around!
The day of our hot spring getaway arrives.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
According to my research, the water here is highly
recommended for soothing medical ailments. It
should be well-suited to heal your injury.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. This just so happens to be the same
place I won a free trip to a while back. Therefore,
we can enjoy this vacation free of charge.

Come to think of it, I do remember her getting a
voucher for a hot spring vacation some time
ago...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Let's not waste any time and go in.
Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That was great. Did you enjoy your bath
too?
choice_data_list: Absolutely. All my muscle tension's gone.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Good. That soak must've improved your blood
circulation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Next is dinner. I went ahead and ordered a hot
pot for us. It's loaded with vitamins B1 and B2,
beta-carotene, allicin—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, I should've asked if there were any
foods you don't like. I did make sure to avoid the
allergies you told me about, but...
choice_data_list:
No, it's not that. I just want you to slow down a
little.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Slow down?
choice_data_list: I want you to enjoy yourself, since we're here.
I want you to enjoy yourself, since we're here.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're constantly worrying about me and putting
my needs ahead of yours.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: So why don't you just let me worry about you for once?
choice_data_list:
I know you're concerned, but you need to take
it easy too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hmph...
choice_data_list:
Come on, let's get some drinks to hydrate
ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. Good idea.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ahh...
choice_data_list: Do you feel a little more relaxed now?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I've been feeling relaxed from the beginning,
since you're by my side.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's have them bring us our dinner now. It'll be
nice to sit back and enjoy a meal.

After our meal is brought to us, we enjoy a
delicious and nutritious dinner together.

I sense that Biwa Hayahide and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
